audit.seoDescription: Review of company cash flows, risk identification - compliance and process setup - optimization.
audit.heroDescription: Review of company cash flows, risk identification - compliance and process setup - optimization.

flows.heading: We review your company's cash flows and identify risks.
stats: 90% of asset stripping goes through invoicing
flows.accountantIntro: Your accountant ONLY records the documents they receive. They do not assess their legitimacy in any way.
auditorChecks: your accountant followed accounting procedures when recording documents
your financial statements give a true and fair view
in other words, whether your numbers match the documents and are recorded according to the law
flows.doesNotMeanIntro: ... but this does not mean that:
doesNotMean: the company has not been defrauded
a supplier is not toxically linked to a related party
flows.auditorDoesNotIntro: On the other hand, an auditor:
auditorDoesNot: does not represent you as a client
does not apply legal remedies to protect you
flows.lossesLabel: Companies lose part of their revenue due to
losses: Disadvantageous contracts with suppliers related to their own employee
flows.stepsLabel: We uncover reality – separate the healthy from the toxic – prepare an overview
steps: We create a cash-flow map (where, who, how much, from when)
We identify persons in conflict of interest with you
outcomes: You will have a clear overview
flows.summary1: Reviewing cash flows is not just about numbers in a spreadsheet. It is a deep scan of your company's health. We identify where money is leaking and whether your transactions are aligned with your interests and strategy.
flows.summary2: Whether you are planning an acquisition or cleaning up your own business, a detailed cash-flow audit gives you peace of mind. We review transaction history, uncover non-standard operations and hold a mirror up to your financial condition. With us, you will know exactly where the money is coming from and where it is actually going.

compliance.heading: Risk identification - compliance
compliance.intro: Risk identification is one of the core pillars of successful company management. The goal is to spot and record early all factors that could lead to breaches of regulations, internal rules or misalignment with applicable legal norms.
areas: Regulatory risks: Changes in legislation (e.g. AML, GDPR, consumer protection) and the threat of sanctions from supervisory authorities.
Operational risks: Gaps in internal processes that may lead to unintentional breaches of regulations.
Reputational risks: Potential damage to the company's good name due to unethical conduct or corruption.
Contractual risks: Risks arising from contractual obligations.
compliance.whistleblowingTipLabel: Tip: Are you aware of the obligation to implement a whistleblower protection system?
compliance.whistleblowingTip: Whistleblowing is not about "snitching" — it is one of the most effective forms of internal company control that allows you to uncover fraud, corruption or other misconduct before they cause irreparable harm.
compliance.dutiesIntro: If you employ 50 or more people (or operate in specific sectors such as financial services), the law imposes the following obligations:
duties: Obligation to set up an internal reporting system: You must have a secure channel for submitting reports (online form, hotline, mail).
Obligation to appoint a responsible person: The company must appoint a person (internal or external) who receives and independently reviews reports.
Obligation to meet deadlines: You must confirm receipt of a report within 7 days and resolve it within 90 days.
Ban on retaliation: Absolute protection of the whistleblower from dismissal or workplace harassment.
compliance.outro: Feel free to contact us for more information on this topic.

optimization.heading: Process setup - optimization
optimization.subheading: Process optimization = From chaos to efficiency
optimization.intro: Do you feel that your company is growing but profits are stagnating? Often, the cause is "invisible thieves" – inefficient processes, duplicated tasks and poor information handoff. Our optimization is not about theory but about removing the barriers that slow your business down.
optimization.whatLabel: What exactly we will do for you

cards.title: Process audit
items: We identify processes and activities that add no value

cards.title: Flow redesign
items: We design leaner and more logical workflows that speed up internal processes

cards.title: Error elimination
cards.text: We set up control mechanisms so that the human factor and the need for constant rework are minimized.

results: Lower operating costs: Fewer unnecessary steps mean lower staff and overhead costs.
Higher substitutability: Clearly defined processes mean one person leaving will not jeopardize an entire department.
Happier employees: Clear responsibilities reduce stress and frustration caused by disorder.
optimization.outro: Feel free to contact us for more information on this topic.

formation.seoDescription: Comprehensive company formation and changes from the initial concept through incorporation to subsequent corporate changes.
formation.heroDescription: From an idea to a functioning company. We deliver a legally, tax and process-ready entity that is ready to grow with you.
formation.foundingHeading: Complete company setup from day one
formation.foundingIntro: We prepare not only the founding documents but also the overall architecture of the company — from the ownership structure and corporate purpose to related contracts.
foundingItems: Analysis of the business plan and recommendation of a suitable legal form
Drafting of founding documents (articles of association, statutes, deed of incorporation)
Arrangement of owner consents for the registered seat and notification duties
Registration in the Commercial Register and with tax authorities
Preparation of statutory and governance documents (rules of procedure, organizational chart)
Consultation on the accounting and tax strategy at the start of the business
formation.changesHeading: Changes that do not slow your business down
formation.changesIntro: When a change happens in the company, speed and accuracy are key. We prepare all necessary documents, arrange notarial acts and handle registration with the Commercial Register.
changesItems: Change of business name, registered seat or business activities
Transfer of ownership interests and change of partners
Changes in statutory bodies and in the way the company is represented
Increase or decrease of registered capital
Setup of control mechanisms and partner rights
Update of internal policies and contractual documentation

liquidation.seoTitle: Liquidation of companies and non-profit organizations
liquidation.seoDescription: Controlled liquidation of companies and non-profit organizations. We prepare you for terminating the entity without unnecessary risk.
liquidation.heroDescription: Terminate the entity in a controlled way. We prepare the entire liquidation process and set the conditions so that you have peace of mind both legally and from a tax perspective.
liquidation.processHeading: From the decision to dissolve to removal from the register
liquidation.processIntro: Liquidating a company or non-profit is a process with multiple milestones that affect the liability of directors and partners. We prepare and document every step.
processItems: Analysis of the entity's assets and liabilities
Partners' resolution to dissolve and enter liquidation
Appointment of the liquidator and notification to the Commercial Register
Notices to creditors and the tax office, publications in the Commercial Gazette
Settlement of receivables and liabilities, sale of assets and termination of contracts
Preparation of interim and final financial statements including the tax return
Approval of the liquidator's final report and distribution of the liquidation balance
Application for removal from the Commercial Register and tax office records
assistanceItems: Full management of the liquidation from decision to removal
Representation before public authorities and creditors
Tax and accounting advisory throughout the liquidation
Protection of directors from personal liability and proper documentation

mergers.seoDescription: Mergers and transformations of companies in line with Slovak and European legislation – from strategic planning to registration.
mergers.heroDescription: Strategic decisions require clean legal and tax execution. We prepare mergers, spin-offs and changes of legal form end-to-end.
mergers.whyLabel: When to consider a transformation or merger
whyItems: Consolidation of multiple companies within one group
Separating risky or unprofitable activities into a standalone entity
Acquisition or sale of part of the business
Change of legal form (e.g. from LLC to joint-stock company)
mergers.processHeading: We prepare the transaction end-to-end and in one logic
processItems: Analysis of the starting structure and goal of the transaction
Proposal of the transformation or merger including tax and accounting impacts
Due diligence of the companies involved
Preparation of transformation or merger projects and all related documents
Securing consents and approvals (general meetings, supervisory bodies)
Coordination with auditors, notaries and registration courts
Registration of the transformation or merger in the Commercial Register and subsequent integration

contact.seoDescription: LegisPro, s.r.o. connects finance, compliance and law into practical solutions. Get in touch and let's plan an initial consultation.
contact.heroDescription: LegisPro, s.r.o. is a law firm focused on connecting law, finance and processes. We help owners, directors and investors make informed decisions.
contact.missionText: We help clients see their company as a whole. We combine legal, tax and process expertise into a single output that is understandable and actionable.
values: Discretion and clear communication throughout the cooperation
A blend of legal, economic and process perspectives
Focus on practical usability of outputs and their defensibility
Long-term care for clients, not one-off projects
